task: Remove emojis from handover markdown output and eliminate misleading completion_pct metric that contradicts accomplishments tracking
discussion_summary: Session completed the removal of emojis (✅/🔲) from writer.py and eliminated the completion_pct field from LLM prompt, reader.py, and checkpoint.py. User raised critical concern: if handover.md still describes this task in present tense after completion, autonomous sessions will re-read it as incomplete work and waste tokens re-verifying/re-implementing. This is a handover document freshness problem — completed work must be marked done or removed from task list before next session reads it.

accomplishments.what: Removed hardcoded emoji characters (✅/🔲) from writer.py line 38
Removed completion_pct field from LLM schema injection in checkpoint.py
Removed completion_pct parsing logic from reader.py
Updated accomplishments markdown rendering to use [x]/[ ] instead of emojis
Pushed all changes to main branch

next_actions.action: Update handover.md task description from present tense ('Remove emojis...') to past tense ('Removed emojis...') or move it to a completed section before next autonomous session starts
next_actions.why: Autonomous agents read handover.md as ground truth for incomplete work. If task remains in present tense after completion, next session will re-verify and re-implement, burning tokens on duplicate work

next_actions.action: Verify that checkpoint.py no longer injects completion_pct into LLM context by running a test handover generation
next_actions.why: Confirm the field is fully removed from the LLM's view, not just the schema

next_actions.action: Build Stage 2 of roadmap (S2) — the next phase after S1 completion
next_actions.why: Session notes indicate S1 is 'mostly done' and stages 2–5 need building

next_actions.action: Address the open goal: 'Verify context checkpoint cards display correct turns remaining in staging'
next_actions.why: Listed as uncompleted in OPEN GOALS; needs verification before moving forward

decisions.decision: Removed completion_pct entirely rather than fixing its derivation logic
decisions.reason: completion_pct was a holistic LLM estimate independent from accomplishments[].done, creating irreconcilable contradiction. Removing it forces single source of truth: accomplishments tracking

decisions.decision: Replaced emoji rendering with ASCII [x]/[ ] syntax
decisions.reason: User explicitly stated emojis cause parsing issues and are unwanted in handover.md

user_rejected_decisions.what_was_proposed: Keep completion_pct as a separate holistic progress metric alongside accomplishments
user_rejected_decisions.user_signal: User pointed out it contradicts accomplishments tracking and causes fallacy when autonomous sessions re-read incomplete task descriptions

user_rejected_decisions.what_was_proposed: Use emoji characters (✅/🔲) in handover markdown output
user_rejected_decisions.user_signal: User explicitly stated 'i don't like them and they will cause parsing issues, so please drop them'

relational_files.why: Contains Phase 4 section that was removed in this session's git diff; tracks overall project stages
Output artifact of writer.py; must be kept in sync with task completion status to prevent autonomous session re-work

blockers: Handover document freshness: next autonomous session will re-read this task as incomplete if handover.md is not updated to reflect completion before session starts
